mapper.insert: INSERT INTO share_links (document_id, share_token, permission, expire_time, created_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{shareToken}, #{permission}, #{expireTime}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, document_id, share_token, permission, expire_time, created_at FROM share_links WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, document_id, share_token, permission, expire_time, created_at FROM share_links WHERE share_token = #{shareToken} LIMIT 1
